title: Multiply them all
prompt: Write product_of(nums) that returns all the numbers multiplied together. product_of([1,2,3,4]) is 24. An empty list returns 1.

help.plain: Multiply every number in the list together, starting from 1.
help.analogy: Like compounding — each number scales the running result.
help.mnemonic: Start the running total at 1 (not 0!), then multiply.
help.nudge: Why must the starting value be 1 and not 0 for multiplication?
